title: Tesla promises FSD V14 Lite for HW3 cars internationally to appease growing tensions
summary:
Tesla posted on X that it plans to expand FSD V14 Lite to HW3 vehicles in international markets — but only after the US rollout is complete and with no timeline attached.

The vague commitment comes as HW3 owners across Europe and other international markets are in open revolt after Tesla launched FSD abroad exclusively for HW4-equipped vehicles.

more…

title: This US city is putting solar + batteries on 150 homes to cut bills
summary:
Ann Arbor is about to test a new way to power homes — and it could become a model for other cities.

Starting this week, energy management company FranklinWH will begin installing solar + battery storage in homes across Ann Arbor, Michigan, as part of a pilot run by the city’s Ann Arbor Sustainable Energy Utility (A2SEU).

more…

title: Toyota’s new bZ electric SUV delivers more driving range than expected
summary:
The new 2026 Toyota bZ has an EPA-estimated driving range of up to 314 miles, but real-world testing suggests it can go even further.

more…

title: Walmart + ABB roll out 400 kW EV chargers – starting in Phoenix
summary:
Walmart has partnered with ABB E-mobility to install its A400 All-in-One DC fast chargers at seven Walmart locations in the Phoenix area. The Arizona sites, along with stores in Colorado, Florida, and Georgia, are part of a broader US-wide Walmart-ABB launch.

more…

title: Nio’s Onvo L80 undercuts Tesla Model Y in China with $36,000 starting price
summary:
Nio’s budget sub-brand Onvo officially launched the L80, a five-seat electric SUV priced from 245,800 yuan (~$36,020), undercutting Tesla’s Model Y by 17,700 yuan (~$2,400) in China.

The L80 opens pre-orders immediately, with first deliveries scheduled for May 15 — adding another aggressive competitor to the most contested EV segment in the world’s largest auto market.

title: Volkswagen will unveil the first EV from its entry-level lineup tomorrow: What to expect
summary:
The ID. Polo is set to kick off a new chapter at Volkswagen as the first model from its new family of entry-level EVs.

title: Heybike Mars 3.0 e-bike hits $1,199 low, Segway Navimow robotic lawn mower sale, Lectric refreshes Lightning e-bike deals, more
summary:
Our Tuesday Green Deals are here, and headlining is Heybike’s 5th Anniversary Sale with up to $800 e-bike savings, which is giving folks a chance to score the Mars 3.0 Folding Fat Tire e-bike with a FREE pannier bag at its $1,199 low for the first time in 2026, among others models. We also have Segway’s ongoing Navimow Earth Day Sale with up to $349 savings on robotic lawn mowers for various yard sizes starting from $679, as well as Lectric’s refreshed 72-hour Lightning Deal Sale with up to $439 savings on the XP4 750 and XPress 750 e-bikes at $1,299 (plus 30% savings on all the brand’s extra batteries). EcoFlow also launched a 48-hour flash sale that has dropped the DELTA 3 Ultra Plus Power Station to its $1,399 low + three other offers, and we spotted EGO’s highly advanced Select Cut and Touch Drive cordless electric mower bundle at one of its best prices, with plenty more waiting for you below. And don’t forget about the hangover deals at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s Jackery 72-hour Mother’s Day flash sale (and the overall sale), the new low on Aiper’s IrriSense 2 smart irrigation system, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

summary:
The 2027 Hyundai IONIQ 9 Calligraphy Performance Black Ink edition is more than just another blacked-out model, and we were invited to see it in person at Hyundai’s plant in Savannah, Georgia.

title: GM is still the #2 EV seller in the US, but for how long?
summary:
GM beat first-quarter earnings expectations after winning a US Supreme Court decision to refund around $500 million from the Trump Administration’s tariffs.

title: The uncomfortable reality behind Rivian’s new ‘billion-dollar’ e-bike brand
summary:
A billion-dollar valuation is a headline that’s hard to ignore. And when it’s attached to a new e-bike brand spun out of a company like Rivian, it’s even harder not to get swept up in the excitement.

But zoom out for a moment, and a more complicated picture starts to emerge.

title: Chinese EVs Can Now Project Entire Movies From Their Headlights
summary: While the U.S. is just catching up on adaptive driving beams, China's newest EVs can project full-color movies from their headlights.

title: Dealerships Are 'Terrified' Direct Sales Might Be The Future
summary: Direct sales are gaining traction in more U.S. states. Dealerships aren't ready to accept defeat just yet.

title: Geely Says This Is China’s First Purpose-Built Robotaxi. I'm Not So Sure
summary: The EVA Cab has no steering wheel and is built with massive robotaxi fleets in mind.

title: Audi's Most Affordable EV Gets More Range, Faster Charging And Updated Tech
summary: The refreshed Q4 E-Tron gets a new range-boosting motor and quicker charging with bidirectional power and has up to three screens.

title: BYD’s Denza Z Is The 1,000-HP Roadster Tesla Refuses To Build
summary: Tesla has continually postponed the second-gen Roadster. Now, China’s BYD is stepping up with a spec monster.

title: Tesla Is Killing The Model S. But Its Legacy Is Everywhere
summary: After 14 years, the Model S is bowing out. But the car industry it helped create will continue living in its shadow.

title: Rivian Has Started R2 Production. Customer Deliveries Are 'On Track' For This Spring
summary: Rivian prepares for its Tesla moment as the R2 production officially kicks off. Deliveries are "on track" for later this spring.
